etymology.description: Depicts a wooden bifurcated plow with originally three cross lines (彡 and 丯) for plow furrows -> later simplified to two cross lines -> final form 耒
etymology.interpretation: The character 耒 (lěi, 'tilling tool') directly represents an ancient agricultural implement, visually illustrating its structure with the cross lines symbolizing furrows made by the tool. This clearly links the character's shape to its function in farming.
